title: Essential Vocabulary - Part 1
description: Common English words for everyday use

lessons.definition: To leave behind or give up completely
examples: He had to abandon his car in the snow.

lessons.definition: The capacity to do something; skill or talent
examples: She has the ability to solve complex problems.

lessons.definition: To achieve or complete successfully
examples: They accomplished their goal ahead of schedule.
What do you want to accomplish this year?

lessons.definition: Correct in all details; exact and precise
To successfully bring about or reach a goal
examples: Hard work helped her achieve success.

lessons.definition: To adjust to new conditions or modify for a new purpose
examples: She quickly adapted to the new job.

lessons.definition: Satisfactory or acceptable in quality or quantity
examples: The solution was adequate but not perfect.

lessons.definition: To alter slightly to achieve desired fit or result
examples: We need to adjust our plans.

lessons.definition: To regard with respect and warm approval
A condition or circumstance that gives a superior position
An exciting or unusual experience with uncertain outcome
examples: They went on an adventure in the mountains.

lessons.definition: To examine methodically and in detail
Clearly visible or understood; obvious
examples: It was apparent that she was tired.
The apparent cause was human error.

lessons.definition: To come near or deal with a situation in a certain way
Suitable or proper in the circumstances
examples: Wear appropriate clothing for the interview.

lessons.definition: Expressing oneself clearly and effectively
To evaluate or estimate the nature, ability, or quality of
examples: We need to assess the situation.

lessons.definition: To suppose to be the case without proof
examples: I assume you're coming to the party.

lessons.definition: To make an effort to achieve or complete something
examples: He made an attempt to apologize.

lessons.definition: To cause to come to a place or participate in something
examples: The festival attracts thousands of visitors.
